whoWhat: A hulking, territorial beast
A gathering of tiny, winged fey
A lone, intelligent animal
A silent, spectral procession
A group of camouflaged hunters setting a trap
A nature spirit tending to the environment
A wounded, solitary humanoid
A source of shimmering, magical energy
A band of aggressive, armed humanoids
A solitary magic-user in a secluded dwelling
A rare and majestic creature, clearly in distress
A group of hedonistic, wild humanoids
A large, powerful creature, deep in slumber
A deceptive, ethereal light
A group of robed figures performing a ritual
A monstrous, web-spinning predator
A lost, defenseless innocent
A group of subterranean creatures, far from home
An ancient, sentient plant
A group of delirious, desperate travelers
complication: The encounter is a deliberate trap or ambush.
They are fiercely protecting a person, place, or object.
The entire encounter is a convincing magical illusion.
They have mistaken the party for someone else (allies or enemies).
A much larger, more dangerous presence is lurking nearby.
The weather suddenly and unnaturally worsens.
The ground becomes unstable or hazardous.
They are being magically controlled or influenced by an unseen force.
The encounter is a test of character by a hidden, powerful entity.
They are holding someone or something hostage.
The area is under the effect of an anti-magic or wild magic field.
They are fleeing from an even greater threat.
The encounter is taking place within a localized time loop.
One of the party members has a secret, unknown connection to them.
They are afflicted by a magical plague or curse.
The encounter is being secretly observed by a third party.
They are not what they appear to be (e.g., polymorphed, disguised).
The encounter is taking place on sacred or forbidden ground.
They possess a powerful, cursed item that influences their actions.
The encounter is a clever distraction for something else happening nearby.
reward: A pouch of currency.
A valuable, non-magical piece of art or jewelry.
A single, potent spell scroll.
A map to a hidden location or treasure.
A minor, but useful, permanent magic item.
The friendship and future aid of a powerful NPC or faction.
A piece of vital information or a crucial clue.
A single, perfectly cut gemstone.
A loyal, trained animal companion.
A key to a locked door or chest somewhere else in the world.
A single-use magic tattoo that confers a special ability.
A deed to a small, remote piece of land.
A powerful, named weapon or piece of armor.
A blessing from a deity that grants a temporary, powerful boon.
A rare, potent alchemical ingredient.
A set of masterwork tools for a specific craft.
A container that is larger on the inside.
A letter of introduction to a powerful guild or secret society.
A single, perfect feather from a celestial being's wing.
Nothing but the satisfaction of overcoming the challenge.
consequence: The party makes a powerful new enemy.
A party member is afflicted with a minor, inconvenient curse.
The party's reputation in the nearest settlement is damaged.
A valuable, non-essential item is lost or destroyed.
The party is now being hunted by a relentless pursuer.
A magical plague or blight is unleashed upon the region.
The party is now responsible for a vulnerable, non-combatant NPC.
A friendly NPC or ally is now in grave danger.
The party is now wanted for a crime they did not (or did) commit.
A portal to a dangerous, hostile plane is opened.
The party is now in debt to a powerful, amoral entity.
A nearby ecosystem is thrown into chaos, causing further problems.
A dark prophecy is triggered, foretelling the party's doom.
The party is now the target of a powerful criminal organization.
A party member is polymorphed into a harmless creature for a short time.
The party is now haunted by a noisy, but harmless, spirit.
A war is accidentally started between two local factions.
The party is now the subject of a terrible, catchy, and widely-sung bard's song.
A powerful, ancient evil is accidentally awakened.
Nothing. The encounter is self-contained and has no lasting effects.
